name: claude-code-dev-assistant
description: Repo-local development assistant plugin for code generation, debugging, explanation, and feature delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Generate code, debug bugs, explain logic, and ship features step by step.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local plugin that turns Claude Code into a dependable day-to-day coding assistant for web apps, AI projects, and general software development.
defaultPrompt: Help me debug this error and explain the fix simply.
Generate a starter implementation for this feature.
Walk me through this code and suggest improvements.
